For Motion For New Trial And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jul-29-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for hearing on Motion for new trial and to tax costs.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearing for Plaintiff:
Frederick C. Roesti, Esq.
1095 Market St., Suite 419
San Francisco, CA. 94103
Appearing for Defendant:
Ingrid M. Evans; Deputy City Attorney.
1390 Market St., 6th Flr.
San Francisco, CA. 94102
Having heard oral arguments of counsels and considered the moving papers and evidence filed.
The Court ordered that Plaintiff's Motion for New Trial is DENIED and Defendant's cost bill is taxed, stricken and reduced (see scanned document). Order signed in open court.
